name: project-argus-extension
description: Workspace-local real-browser validation harness for Project Argus.
//: The Node unit test suite (tests/run_*.js) needs NO dependencies — run it with `node tests/<file>.js`. Playwright is only used by the optional `test:browser` harness; it is vendored under vendor/ and marked optional so a plain `npm install` never fails when it is absent or offline.
